'''Ebranese''' was the [[Language/Legends|language]] of the [[Ebranite]] [[Species/Legends|species]]. It consisted of growls, moans, and honks. The language also used [[pictograph]]s to tell past historical events.<ref name="Ultimate Alien Anthology" />

{{Language-stub}}
